response.justification: Seasoned full-stack engineer with well over a decade of experience and a clear command of the primary stack: TypeScript and Node.js across multiple roles, React at Optilyz, plus recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) that maps directly to the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD pedigree, Docker/Kubernetes, Git/CI-CD, and a CS degree round out a solid match. Main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience and a heavy DLang emphasis that is outside the target stack, but these are easily probed in an interview and outweighed by depth and adaptability.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React full-stack experience across several companies
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks) matching a key requirement
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, Docker/Kubernetes, Git
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience (stack-specific tools)
Significant focus on DLang, which is not part of the target stack
React/frontend depth appears concentrated in one role; PostgreSQL not explicitly listed
